$comment: Selector registry for grocery-list. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. Anchors target the seeded 'Weekly shop' list (src/qa/fixtures.ts). text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label).

weekly-list.note: the seeded QA list. Wrapped with .* because the list card merges title+subtitle into one a11y label ('Weekly shop, 2 of 12 checked') on iOS; Maestro full-matches the regex, so bare 'Weekly shop' never matched a screen where the card is plainly visible.

first-item.note: first seeded item, confirms the list opened

add-input.note: the List-detail add bar — now a Pressable (a11y 'Add an item') that OPENS the full-screen Add-items sheet. Tap it to open the sheet before searching/typing. Distinct from the sheet title 'Add items' and search 'Search or add an item' under Maestro's full-match regex.

add-search.note: the Add-items sheet search field (placeholder + a11y 'Search or add an item', from detail.searchOrAdd). Tap to focus, then type — the keyboard's return key adds whatever you typed.

sheet-done.note: the Add-items sheet header Done button (common.done). testID, NOT text — the keyboard's own 'Done' return key would clash with a text match. Tap to close the sheet and return to the list to assert the item landed.

added-item.note: an item NOT in the seed history; typed + submitted in the Add-items sheet. Its list row uses accessibilityLabel={it.name} (ListDetailScreen), and 'avocado' is a real keyword in src/data/categories.ts, so the anchor is grounded. assertNot before / assert after = the add actually landed on the list.

share-open.note: the List-detail header share button (a11y detail.shareThis on an unshared list). Full-match is unique while on the detail screen; the Share screen's identical title only exists after the tap.

share-lead.text: Anyone with this can see and edit.*
share-lead.note: the Share screen lead line (share.leadBefore + list name + share.leadAfter merge into one text node). Unique to the Share screen, so waiting on it proves the navigation landed before the share screenshot.
